top_signals.title: FCA charges City lawyer with insider dealing over maternity brand acquisition
top_signals.summary: The financial watchdog has charged a City lawyer with five counts of alleged insider dealing for trading in the assets of maternity fashion brand Seraphine Group using confidential information he gained while working on the company’s acquisition. The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) said Richard Bloomfield, 38, worked on an acquisition of the City-based maternity clothing company [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
